title: Supplementaries Touch-Ups
body:
This is a work in progress resource pack for Supplementaries that makes some bocks and items more vibrant and readable. The scope is quite small at the moment, but there will likely be more retextures added in the future.

Currently this pack primarily focuses on building blocks, but there's also some changes made to both items and functional blocks.

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44cd94cf5dd7b175da11ee76af7e3f50d2a33348.png)
